Bash(node -e "const t = require\('@huggingface/transformers'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(t\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('env'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(t.env ? 'env found' : 'env not found'\);")
